provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male in a Compact uniform but his skin is rotting and grey, his eyes are milky white, his jaw hangs open showing blackened teeth, the uniform is torn and blood-splattered, he stands in a shambling pose, this is a horror zombie costume not a character in a lived-in sci-fi universe, the genre is wrong
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Rotting grey skin, milky eyes, bloodied torn uniform. Horror zombie genre not lived-in sci-fi. Wrong genre.
